did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper used quantitative image analysis methods (frequency band energy analysis in Fourier domain, CurveAlign, and CT-FIRE fibre analysis) on ex vivo multiphoton microscopy images to measure collagen features. While the discussion mentions that artificial intelligence algorithms could be built for automated detection in the future, the study itself did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
